# cloud_aws corpus. Synthetic invalid placeholders only.

# === AWS / IAM and STS unique IDs ===
# expect: AWS STS Temporary Access Key
# expect: AWS STS Bearer Token Unique ID
# expect: AWS Context-Specific Credential ID
# expect: AWS IAM User Unique ID
# expect: AWS EC2 Instance Profile ID
# expect: AWS IAM Role Unique ID
# expect: AWS Server Certificate ID
# expect: AWS Public Key ID
# expect: AWS IAM User Group ID
# expect: AWS Managed Policy ID
# expect: AWS Managed Policy Version ID
Token ASIAIOSFODNN7EXAMPLE in text.
Bearer ABIAIOSFODNN7EXAMPLE here.
Context ACCAIOSFODNN7EXAMPLE here.
User AIDAIOSFODNN7EXAMPLE here.
Profile AIPAIOSFODNN7EXAMPLE here.
Role AROAIOSFODNN7EXAMPLE here.
Cert ASCAIOSFODNN7EXAMPLE here.
Public APKAEIBAERJR2EXAMPLE here.
Group AGPAIOSFODNN7EXAMPLE here.
Policy ANPAIOSFODNN7EXAMPLE here.
Version ANVAIOSFODNN7EXAMPLE here.

# === AWS / ARNs ===
# expect: AWS IAM ARN
# expect: AWS STS Assumed-Role ARN
# expect: AWS KMS Key ARN
# expect: AWS Secrets Manager ARN
# expect: AWS DynamoDB Stream ARN
# expect: AWS IoT Thing ARN
arn:aws:iam::123456789012:role/S3AccessExample
arn:aws:sts::123456789012:assumed-role/AccountingRole/MaryExample
arn:aws:kms:us-east-1:123456789012:key/12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789012
arn:aws:secretsmanager:us-east-1:123456789012:secret:prod/db-AbCdEf
arn:aws:dynamodb:us-east-1:123456789012:table/Orders/stream/2024-01-01T00:00:00.000
arn:aws:iot:us-east-1:123456789012:thing/sensor-01-example

# === AWS / AppSync ===
# expect: AWS AppSync API Key
da2-abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz

# === AWS / S3 and CloudFront signed URLs ===
# expect: AWS S3 Presigned URL
# expect: AWS S3 Presigned URL (legacy v2)
# expect: AWS CloudFront Signed URL
https://bucket.s3.amazonaws.com/key?X-Amz-Algorithm=AWS4-HMAC-SHA256&X-Amz-Signature=0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef
https://x/k?AWSAccessKeyId=AKIAIOSFODNN7EXAMPLE&Expires=1700000000&Signature=abcDEF123%3D
https://d.cloudfront.net/v?Expires=1700000000&Signature=aBcD~_-eFgH&Key-Pair-Id=APKAEIBAERJR2EXAMPLE

# === AWS / EKS and SigV4 ===
# expect: AWS EKS aws-auth Bearer Token
# expect: AWS SigV4 Authorization Header
k8s-aws-v1.aHR0cHM6Ly9zdHMuYW1hem9uYXdzExample
AWS4-HMAC-SHA256 Credential=AKIAIOSFODNN7EXAMPLE/20240101/us-east-1/s3/aws4_request

# === AWS / Marketplace and SP-API ===
# expect: AWS MWS Auth Token
# expect: AWS SP-API LWA Refresh Token
# expect: AWS SP-API LWA Access Token
amzn.mws.4ea38b7b-f563-7709-4bae-87aeaEXAMPLE
Atzr|IwEBIAexampleRefreshTokenValue123
Atza|IwEBIAexampleAccessTokenValue1234

# === AWS / Bedrock ===
# expect: AWS Bedrock API Key (long-lived)
# expect: AWS Bedrock API Key (short-lived)
ABSKabcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyzABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ0123456789abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyzABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ0123456789abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyzABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ0123456789==
bedrock-api-key-eyJexample.token-value

# === AWS / SageMaker and RDS ===
# expect: AWS SageMaker Notebook Token URL
# expect: AWS RDS IAM Auth Connection String
https://nb.notebook.us-east-1.sagemaker.aws/?token=abc123def456789
mysql://appuser@mydb.cluster.rds.amazonaws.com:3306/app?plugin=AWSAuthenticationPlugin
